overview.what: A dual-mode summarization tool that can condense long articles into short, readable summaries. It supports both extractive (picking key sentences) and abstractive (rewriting content) methods.
overview.how_it_works: The abstractive mode uses the BART or T5 transformer architecture, which is pre-trained on large text-summary datasets. The model encodes the entire input document and decodes it into a significantly shorter, more concise version while maintaining the core meaning.

files.description: Abstractive summarization using the pipeline API.
files.code:
from transformers import pipeline

summarizer = pipeline("summarization", model="facebook/bart-large-cnn")

def get_summary(text, max_len=130, min_len=30):
    summary = summarizer(text, max_length=max_len, min_length=min_len, do_sample=False)
    return summary[0]['summary_text']

# Example
# text = "... long article here ..."
# print(get_summary(text))
